headline: IDEXX Laboratories to Release 2026 First Quarter Financial Results
summary: WESTBROOK, Maine, April 08, 2026--IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. (NASDAQ: IDXX), a global leader in pet healthcare innovation, has scheduled the release of its 2026 first quarter financial results for Tuesday, May 5, 2026, before the market opens. The Company will conduct an analyst conference call beginning at 8:30 a.m. ET on that day.

headline: Alcon Stock Gains Following the Launch of Clareon TruPlus at ASCRS
summary: ALC gains after launching Clareon TruPlus IOL, expanding its portfolio with enhanced depth of focus while maintaining high-quality distance vision.

headline: Is This the Right Time to Hold STERIS Stock in Your Portfolio?
summary: STE rides on strong Healthcare and AST growth, but FX swings, tariffs, and rising costs cloud the outlook for investors.

headline: Will UK Rollout of Early Canine Cancer Test Change IDEXX Laboratories' (IDXX) Preventive Care Narrative?
summary: In early April 2026, IDEXX Laboratories expanded its IDEXX Cancer Dx Panel to the UK, offering veterinarians a £22.50 blood test that can detect canine lymphoma up to eight months before clinical signs, with results in 3–5 business days. The move taps into strong UK pet-owner interest in cancer screening and builds on adoption by nearly 6,000 North American clinics since 2025, underscoring IDEXX’s push to embed cancer diagnostics into routine wellness care. Now we’ll explore how this UK...
